title: Google ADK Translation, Runner, Sessions, Tools, Callbacks, and Confirmation
description: The team adopts a framework before understanding its state and effects, duplicates policy in callbacks, trusts defaults, and cannot map framework events back to verified core contracts. Learners cumulatively produce auditable Google ADK adapter and conformance suite through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Map product policy, provider port, loop, tool registry, session, memory, approval, events, evals, and telemetry to ADK concepts and identify gaps.
Configure Agent, model, instruction, tools, Runner, invocation, events, and async lifecycle with explicit versions and bounded behavior.
Select and test ADK session and memory services for identity, persistence, isolation, migration, retention, and replay boundaries.
